DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-23-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Counsel's written request for the matter to be continued to Oct 4, 2002 was submitted late. The Court received the written request on the afternoon of Sept. 20, 2002. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Defendant ANDRIA DAVIS' demurrer to amended complaint is SUSTAINED without leave as to the 4th cause of action. Request to continue is denied. (JJM/301/CL) Court Reporter Eric Throne, CSR 7855

MOTION Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer;To Complaint And Motion To Strike;Demurrer;
Off Calendar Jul-09-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Richard W. Osman, Esq. for defendants ANDRIA DAVIS and JULIE BIANCHI demurring party

COURT CALL APPEARANCE: Neil D. Martin, Esq. of HILL, FARRER & BURRILL LLP 213/620-0460 for
Plaintiff and opposing party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling --
Defendant ANDRIA DAVIS' Demurrer to Complaint & Motion to Strike Complaint:
1) Demurrer to 4th cause of action for breach of duty of loyalty is sustained with 20 days leave to amend to allege facts giving rise to a fiduciary duty if plaintiff can do so in good faith.
2) Motion to strike punitive damages allegation is denied.
3) Motion to strike reference in paragraph 31 to "West Los Angeles" office is granted. Order signed in open court. (JJM/KH) Reporter: Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
